message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus mission (#1019)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-3372-add-allow-adding-readiness-probes-to-eventbus",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus",
+    "description": "Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-events deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-events version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nhelm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-events installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nWe noticed that `EventBus`'s StatefulSet doesn't have readiness probes, although it has startup & liveness probes.\n\nAdd (or Allow adding) readiness probes to `EventBus` StatefulSet\n\n**Describe alternatives you've considered**\nNo alternatives."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus",
+        "description": "Adds `ReadinessProbe` to EventBus StatefulSets (JetStream and NATS Streaming) to fix GKE warnings and enable proper PodDisruptionBudget functionality.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds `ReadinessProbe` to EventBus StatefulSets (JetStream and NATS Streaming) to fix GKE warnings and enable proper PodDisruptionBudget functionality.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],
